name: Dev Tools
description: Modern CLI utilities for productive development

commands: set -e && LAZYGIT_VERSION=$(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/jesseduffield/lazygit/releases/latest" | grep -Po '"tag_name": *"v\K[^"]*') && LAZYGIT_ARCH=$(uname -m | sed -e 's/x86_64/x86_64/' -e 's/aarch64/arm64/' -e 's/arm64/arm64/') && curl -Lo /tmp/lazygit.tar.gz "https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/releases/download/v${LAZYGIT_VERSION}/lazygit_${LAZYGIT_VERSION}_Linux_${LAZYGIT_ARCH}.tar.gz" && tar xf /tmp/lazygit.tar.gz -C /tmp lazygit && install -m 755 /tmp/lazygit /usr/local/bin/lazygit && rm -f /tmp/lazygit /tmp/lazygit.tar.gz

packages.name: delta
packages.description: Git diff viewer with syntax highlighting

commands: set -e && TAG=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/dandavison/delta/releases/latest | grep -oP '"tag_name": "\K[^"]*') && ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) && curl -fsSLo /tmp/delta.deb "https://github.com/dandavison/delta/releases/download/${TAG}/git-delta_${TAG#v}_${ARCH}.deb" && (dpkg -i /tmp/delta.deb || apt-get install -f -y) && rm -f /tmp/delta.deb

set -e && TAG=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} https://github.com/ClementTsang/bottom/releases/latest | awk -F/ '{print $NF}') && ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) && curl -fsSLo /tmp/bottom.deb "https://github.com/ClementTsang/bottom/releases/download/${TAG}/bottom_${TAG#v}_${ARCH}.deb" && (dpkg -i /tmp/bottom.deb || apt-get install -f -y) && rm -f /tmp/bottom.deb

set -e && TAG=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} https://github.com/bootandy/dust/releases/latest | awk -F/ '{print $NF}') && ARCH=$(uname -m | sed -e 's/x86_64/x86_64/' -e 's/aarch64/aarch64/' -e 's/arm64/aarch64/') && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/bootandy/dust/releases/download/${TAG}/dust-${TAG}-${ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" | tar xzf - -C /tmp && install -m 755 /tmp/dust-*/dust /usr/local/bin/dust && rm -rf /tmp/dust-*

set -e && TAG=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/latest | awk -F/ '{print $NF}') && ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) && curl -fsSLo /tmp/hyperfine.deb "https://github.com/sharkdp/hyperfine/releases/download/${TAG}/hyperfine_${TAG#v}_${ARCH}.deb" && (dpkg -i /tmp/hyperfine.deb || apt-get install -f -y) && rm -f /tmp/hyperfine.deb

set -e && TAG=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/releases/latest | awk -F/ '{print $NF}') && ARCH=$(uname -m | sed -e 's/x86_64/x86_64/' -e 's/aarch64/aarch64/' -e 's/arm64/aarch64/') && curl -fsSLo /tmp/yazi.zip "https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/releases/download/${TAG}/yazi-${ARCH}-unknown-linux-gnu.zip" && unzip -qo /tmp/yazi.zip -d /tmp && install -m 755 /tmp/yazi-*/yazi /usr/local/bin/yazi && install -m 755 /tmp/yazi-*/ya /usr/local/bin/ya && rm -rf /tmp/yazi*

packages.name: zoxide
packages.description: Smarter cd that learns your habits

commands: set -e && TAG=$(curl -Ls -o /dev/null -w %{url_effective} https://github.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/releases/latest | awk -F/ '{print $NF}') && ARCH=$(uname -m | sed -e 's/x86_64/x86_64/' -e 's/aarch64/aarch64/' -e 's/arm64/aarch64/') && curl -fsSLo /tmp/zoxide.tar.gz "https://github.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/releases/download/${TAG}/zoxide-${TAG#v}-${ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz" && tar xzf /tmp/zoxide.tar.gz -C /tmp zoxide && install -m 755 /tmp/zoxide /usr/local/bin/zoxide && rm -f /tmp/zoxide /tmp/zoxide.tar.gz

packages.name: eza
packages.description: Modern ls replacement with icons and git

commands: set -e && apt-get install -y gpg wget && mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings && wget -qO- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/eza-community/eza/main/deb.asc | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/gierens.gpg && echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/gierens.gpg] http://deb.gierens.de stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/gierens.list && chmod 644 /etc/apt/keyrings/gierens.gpg /etc/apt/sources.list.d/gierens.list && apt-get update && apt-get install -y eza
set -e && curl https://mise.run | env MISE_INSTALL_PATH=/usr/local/bin/mise INSTALLER_NO_MODIFY_PATH=1 sh
